en: So, I guess the case that I was making last time, at least in part, was that one way of
conceptualizing the fundamental problem that human beings face is to conceptualize it as
ko: 인간이 직면한 근본적인 문제를 개념화하는 한 가지 방법이

en: an ongoing struggle with complexity. And complexity emerges as a consequence of the sort of finite
boundedness of individual consciousness and the incredible excess of the unbounded everywhere
else, even including underneath that consciousness. Because, of course, your individual consciousness
ko: 그 의식 아래에서도 마찬가지야. 물론 너의 개별 의식 때문이지
